title: Smoky Australian Kangaroo Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender kangaroo meat, smoky spices, and a mix of Australian herbs.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Brown the kangaroo in batches, then set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the smoky paprika and thyme; cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth, red wine, tomato paste, and browned kangaroo. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours, or until the kangaroo is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Remove the bay leaves and serve hot.
Enjoy with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes.
